name: Centurion Corporation Limited
summary: Centurion Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, owns, develops, and manages workers and student accommodation assets in Singapore, the United Kingdom, the United States, Malaysia, Australia, and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Workers Accommodation, Student Accommodation, and Others. It manages workers accommodation assets under the Westlite Accommodation brand and student accommodation assets under the dwell brand. As of December 31, 2020, the company owned and managed a portfolio of 35 operational accommodation assets totaling 73,460 beds. It also manufactures and sells optical discs and related data storage products. In addition, the company offers laundry; cleaning and maintenance; management; utilities and transportation; tourist; asset management; fund management; trustee; and business and management consultancy services. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Singapore. Centurion Corporation Limited is a subsidiary of Centurion Properties Pte Ltd.
